summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 18/12/2023
DCE iron ore futures market falling trends by 1.59%. the main contract I2405 closed 928.some traders were active to sell, steel mills purchased on demand. today's overall market transaction atmosphere in general.
